original_title: MDYD-905 Married Woman Who Drops the Key -Special Edition- Hitomi - Hitomi (Hitomi Tanaka)
overview: peaceful life with her husband. Such a life changes completely when she meets Sawamura, an exterior wall contractor. Hitomi, who was attracted to him from the first meeting, dared to use the key to seduce him. A man and a woman who want each other passionately with few words. The two eventually climax violently. When my husband goes on a business trip, I take my time and drown in a dense affair.
